parameters.cypherQuery:
=MATCH (pa:PhysicalApplication)
RETURN 
  pa.displayId as DisplayID,
  pa.name as Name,
  pa.managementStrategy as ManagementStrategy,
  pa.applicationSuitability as ApplicationSuitability,
  pa.businessCriticality as BusinessCriticality,
  pa.estimatedAnnualOPEX as EstimatedAnnualOpex
